projects.authority: Andhra Pradesh Airports Development Corporation Ltd (APADCL)
projects.ppp_mode: Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT)
projects.description: Construction and operation of a new greenfield international airport at Bhogapuram to handle passenger and cargo traffic serving the Visakhapatnam region.

projects.project_name: Visakhapatnam Port Trust - Mechanization of EQ-7 Berth
projects.description: Mechanization of East Quay-7 berth at Visakhapatnam Port for handling steam coal and thermal coal imports.

projects.authority: Amaravati Metro Rail Corporation (AMRC) / AP Metro Rail Corporation
projects.ppp_mode: Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT)
projects.description: Mass Rapid Transit System for Visakhapatnam covering 3 corridors: Steel Plant to Kamalalayam (34 km), Gurudwara to Old Post Office (5 km), and Madhurawada to Nad Junction (20 km).

projects.authority: National Highways Logistics Management Limited (NHLML) / CONCOR
projects.ppp_mode: Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT)
projects.description: Development of a Multi-Modal Logistics Park over 100 acres in Visakhapatnam to provide warehousing, container storage, and rail-road transfer facilities.
